tasks.name: Add cost_override_log table to STDB schema (thread_id, approver, justification, timestamp, approved_cost_usd)
Add cost_anomaly_detected event emission to sop_executor.rs post-run hook when actual_cost > persona_7day_avg * 3
Create hex admin approve-cost CLI command in hex-cli — takes thread_id, approver, justification, writes to cost_override_log, sets sop_run_override flag in STDB
Add override button to held SOP runs in MissionControl inbox — operator clicks, POSTs to /api/cost/override with thread_id, writes cost_override_log
Wire sop_executor.rs to read sop_run_override flag from STDB before cost gate check — proceed if override present + approved_cost_override_usd >= estimated cost

phases.name: Cost anomaly triage notification + kill switches

tasks.name: Create cost anomaly inbox notification in MissionControl — priority notification when cost_anomaly_detected event fires, shows thread_id, actual vs avg cost, link to phase trace
Document HEX_DISABLE_{PERSONA} kill switches in README.md — per ADR-[PHONE], operator can set HEX_DISABLE_DRAFTER=true to pause that loop
Wire persona-level kill switches into sop_executor.rs, twin_reviewer.rs, drafter.rs — check HEX_DISABLE_{ROLE} env at poll start, skip if set
Create hex-cli/src/commands/cost_report.rs — queries STDB inference_log, aggregates by persona/tool/week, generates Markdown table with runs/total$/avg$/top tool/cache hit %
Add hex cost-report CLI command — generates weekly report, writes to ~/.hex/cost-reports/YYYY-WW.md, prints to stdout
Create weekly cost report cron job example in docs/ops/cost-monitoring.md — 0 9 * * 1 hex cost-report --email operator@example.com

phases.name: Verify override flow + anomaly detection + kill switches

tasks.name: cargo check hex-nexus + hex-cli — verify Rust changes compile
Manual test: set HEX_SOP_COST_GATE_USD=0.01, trigger SOP, verify held, run hex admin approve-cost, verify SOP proceeds
Manual test: trigger SOP with cost 4x persona avg, verify cost_anomaly_detected fires, inbox notification appears in Mission Control
Manual test: set HEX_DISABLE_DRAFTER=true, restart daemon, verify drafter loop does not poll, set false, verify resumes
Manual test: run hex cost-report, verify Markdown table output, check ~/.hex/cost-reports/ for YYYY-WW.md file
